title: Contact | Helen Grant
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Helen Grant, Conservative Member of Parliament for Maidstone and Malling
headings: h3: Helen Grant Conservative Candidate for Maidstone and Malling
text_excerpt: Contact | Helen Grant Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Helen News Advice Surgeries My Plan In Parliament Contact Cost of Living Help Hub Apprenticeship Portal Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey Contact Leave this field blank Constituency Office First Floor, 109 Week Street, Maidstone, Kent , ME14 1RB 01622 669623 [email protected] Helen on Twitter Helen on Instagram Helen's team are available by phone Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm except for public holidays and the extended Christmas and New Year period. You can get in touch by phone or email, or alternatively you can send a message via the webform below. Please note when contacting Helen about potential casework, it is essential that constituents provide their full residential postal address (including postcode) and a contact telephone number. Constituency Office Helen's constituency office is located at the north end of Week Street, above 'Pets Corner.' Car Parking is available at a range of public car parks nearby. These include Maidstone East Railway Station and Brewer Street car parks. Media enquiries For Media enquiries, contact Helen's office via [email protected] Press Releases are uploaded to the 'News' section of this website. If you are a local or national journalist and would like to be added to Helen's press distribution list, then please e-mail your request. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
